rows.Event Name: How to Position Yourself for Leadership Opportunities
rows.Event Description: Hidden reasons strong performers stay stuck and strategic shifts that turn capable professionals into visible leaders ready for promotion. Many capable professionals work hard, deliver strong results, and still find themselves overlooked when promotion opportunities arise. Not because they lack talent. But because they are positioned as At a certain stage in your career, effort alone is not enough. Progress begins to depend on something deeper: Without that clarity, many professionals fall into a pattern of overthinking: And months — sometimes years — pass without meaningful progress. During this 90-minute webclass you will discover: • Why many high-performing professionals remain stuck despite strong results You will also go through a short guided reflection exercise to help you evaluate This webclass is designed for professionals who: • consistently perform well but feel their career progression has slowed By the end of the session, you will walk away with: • greater clarity about what may be holding your career back During the session, I will also briefly share how professionals who want deeper support can continue this process inside a structured program designed to help turn clarity into real career momentum.

rows.Event Name: Santa Muerte's Sacred Realignment Service (Limited Spots)
rows.Event Description: Email smlovestemple@gmail.com to receive a free divination session to see if this is the service for you! Tired of self sabotaging? Ready to take your life seriously and start fresh? If your answer is yes, this is for you. This service is the answered prayer for Santa Muerte Devotees who, feel confused, are stuck in old cycles, are experiencing a stream of bad luck, have stubborn energies that just won't leave and have experienced a break up, and any kind of loss. Santa Muerte's13 Day Sacred Realignment service is an elevated uncrossing service, that's performed by our High Priestess, spiritual herbalist & healer. The service ignites a holy release of situations, people, negative cycles and thought patterns so that deep renewal and transformative new beginnings can take place. Uncrossing is liberation, is remembrance. Allow Santa Muerte's protective sheath and transformative love realign you to a higher timeline of Divine love, peace and abundance. What else you get: A sacred divination session (learn what this means for you) organic herbal tea (support mind & heart healing) blessed spiritual bath (another layer of purificaton) 3 live workshops ( tools on inner child healing & clarity) Refer a friend and get 25% on future products & services.
